scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.build:deploy: pnpm --filter @workspace/ads-manager run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build && rm -rf artifacts/api-server/dist/public && cp -r artifacts/ads-manager/dist/public artifacts/api-server/dist/public
scripts.start:deploy: pnpm --filter @workspace/db run push && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run start
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
